name: Recruiter: save current search URL results to project
description: Saves candidates from an already-built Recruiter search URL. Use this after a focused search/extract has produced a concrete /talent/search URL, to avoid re-driving the advanced-search facet form. Params: search_url, project_name, target_count.

steps.intent: Open existing Recruiter search results URL
Select result cards and save them to project
